prompt_text: Raycast vs Spotlight pricing and features
response:
# Raycast vs Spotlight: Pricing & Features Comparison

## Pricing

| Feature | Raycast | Spotlight |
|---------|---------|-----------|
| **Base Cost** | Free | Free (built-in) |
| **Pro Plan** | $8/month or $80/year | N/A |
| **Business Plan** | $15/month (team billing) | N/A |

## Key Features

### Raycast
✅ **Strengths:**
- Advanced command palette with 400+ built-in commands
- API & extensions marketplace
- AI features (Pro: Claude, GPT-4)
- Window management & system control
- Clipboard history & snippets
- Team collaboration features (Pro)
- Cross-platform extensibility
- Workflow automation
- Custom scripts & integrations

❌ **Limitations:**
- Paid features require Pro subscription
- Steeper learning curve
- Smaller ecosystem than alternatives

### Spotlight
✅ **Strengths:**
- Native macOS integration
- Zero cost (included with macOS)
- Fast & lightweight
- Minimal setup required
- Handles web searches well

❌ **Limitations:**
- Limited customization
- No extensions/plugins
- Basic functionality only
- No automation capabilities
- No AI features
- macOS-only

## Quick Verdict

| Use Case | Best Choice |
|----------|------------|
| **Budget-conscious** | Spotlight |
| **Power users** | Raycast |
| **Advanced automation** | Raycast |
| **Minimal setup** | Spotlight |
| **AI integration** | Raycast |

**Choose Raycast if** you want extensibility, AI, and automation.  
**Choose Spotlight if** you need basic searching without extra cost.
